allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Workflow Management System - Major Feature Updates

## Features Added:
- Multiple user selection for workflow approvers
- Workflow submission actions: submit, recall, resubmit, clone, cancel, delete
- Workflow preview dialog for form builder
- Confirm dialog component for action confirmations

## Bug Fixes:
- Fixed form builder not showing all fields \(duplicate forms issue\)
- Fixed workflow form field property mapping between frontend/backend
- Fixed user dropdown not showing users in approver selection
- Added fullName field to UserDTO for proper display
- Added @Transactional annotations to prevent lazy loading issues

## Backend Changes:
- WorkflowInstanceService: Added delete, clone, recall, resubmit methods
- WorkflowInstanceController: Added endpoints for new actions
- WorkflowService: Fixed form/field processing to prevent orphan forms
- UserService: Added getAllActiveUsers with proper transactional support
- ApprovalHistory: Added RECALLED action type
- WorkflowApproverDTO: Added approverIds for multi-user selection

## Frontend Changes:
- workflow-instances.component: Added action menu with all submission actions
- workflow-builder.component: Fixed formId tracking for proper updates
- workflow.service: Added API methods for new instance actions
- Created ConfirmDialogComponent for reusable confirmations
- Created WorkflowPreviewDialogComponent for form preview

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd //c "set PGPASSWORD=P@88345! && psql -h localhost -U sonar -d workflow -c ""SELECT setting_key FROM settings LIMIT 1;""")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Multi-Step Screens Feature & UI Branding Updates

Add Screens entity to enable multi-step wizard-style workflow forms:
- Screen entity, DTO, and repository for managing form screens
- Fields and field groups can now be assigned to specific screens
- EAGER loading for screen relationships to ensure proper data retrieval
- Workflow builder supports screen creation and field assignment
- Workflow form renders multi-step navigation with step indicators
- Compact step indicator and screen header styling
- Brand logo \(sonar_logo.png\) and favicon \(sonar_icon.png\) integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/15/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U sonar -d workflow -c "SELECT username, email, is_active FROM users LIMIT 5;")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Email approval flow improvements and submission title in notifications

- Add inline login flow for email approval actions \(no popup dialog\)
- Auto-process approval actions after successful authentication
- Fix JWT filter to skip email approval token extraction
- Add SPA routing for /email-approval page
- Include submission title in approval/rejection notification emails
- Fix audit tab field mapping \(actionDate, userFullName, summary\)
- Add escalate and review action support in email approvals

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
